query:
SELECT id, title, SUBSTRING(content, LOCATE('Check Price', content) - 100, 300) as check_price_context 
FROM articles 
WHERE content LIKE '%Check Price%' AND status = 'published' 
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mexMZK3NDs3KsAz.c9d58c93f039 --database RymVrvaM7i66nf7Xs2w9Hu --execute SELECT id, title, SUBSTRING(content, LOCATE('Check Price', content) - 100, 300) as check_price_context
